title: Argentinian-Style Stir Fry with Onion
description: A savory and mildly flavorful stir fry recipe from Argentina, featuring onions and your choice of protein.

ingredients.name: Protein of choice (chicken, beef, or tofu)

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced protein and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the protein from the skillet and set aside.
Add the minced garlic and chopped onion to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the savory mild seasoning, salt, and pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the protein to the skillet and stir to combine with the onion and garlic mixture.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the protein is cooked through.
